latest.title: RDS vs DynamoDB: How to Think About Data in the Cloud
latest.description: RDS and DynamoDB solve different problems. Learn the mental model for choosing between them based on your data and access patterns.

latest.title: AWS Nitro and CPU Graviton Meets Unikernels
latest.description: Rethink the cloud with Nanos Unikernel...

latest.title: Deploying a Secure Ubuntu EC2 Web Server with IAM, Billing Alerts, and Access Control on AWS
latest.description: As part of my AWS Cloud Club Unilorin Bootcamp 2026 lab, I completed a practical cloud deployment that combined core AWS foundations with hands-on implementation. The project covered billing control, IAM administration, EC2 provisioning, security group configuration, role-based access, and web server deployment on an Ubuntu instance.

latest.title: AIdeas Finalist: Mornist
latest.description: Six months ago I could not wake before 9 AM. Today I wake at 5:40 without an alarm. Not because I found a louder ringtone — because I stopped treating waking up as a sound problem and started treating it as a training problem. Mornist is the AI coach I built to do that training. The judges had five challenges for me. This article is my answer to all five.

latest.title: AIdeas Finalist: Rakshak
latest.description:
Rakshak ("protector" in Sanskrit) predicts women's safety risk in Indian cities *before* it happens, then connects that intelligence to police action.

**Unlike reactive SOS apps** (Nirbhaya, Himmat+), Rakshak's Random Forest model (17 Chennai-specific features) scores your location's risk live via AWS SageMaker. The SHO dashboard + Patrol Route Optimizer deploys units to 44 high-risk zones. After 8 PM, proactive Wellness Checks alert stationary users in danger zones.

latest.title: AIdeas Finalist - Diverge — AI-Powered Decision Intelligence
latest.description: Diverge takes a life decision you are stuck on and runs it through a structured AI debate. You type something like "Stay at my job vs. take the offer" or "Stay in Boston vs. move to Austin." The app spawns two agents, each one representing your future self on one side of that choice. They argue it out across five rounds while pulling from Monte Carlo financial simulations, real salary data, and cost-of-living numbers.

latest.title: AIdeas Finalist: VoiceAid – Bridging the Digital Divide for the Non-Literate and Elderly
latest.description: VoiceAid reimagines digital access through an orality-first approach, enabling non-literate and elderly users to interact with technology using natural speech instead of text. Powered by Amazon Bedrock and Nova Sonic, it delivers real-time, localized, and offline-capable assistance for critical needs like healthcare, farming, and scam prevention.

latest.title: AIdeas Finalist: NagrikAI - AI-Powered Government Benefits Navigator
latest.description: Conversational AI-powered platform for discovering and accessing government benefits, designed for inclusive access via mobile, voice, and feature phones

latest.title: AIdeas Finalist: REGAIN - Your Professional Edge.
latest.description: A campaign driven career platform for veterans and AI displaced workers, built around evidence instead of enrollment and a voice native coach instead of another chat box. The output is a machine readable, evidence linked profile designed for a hiring environment moving toward agents.

latest.title: AIdeas Finalist: ReadEase AI
latest.description: ReadEase AI is a browser extension that combines dyslexia-friendly formatting with on-demand AI comprehension tools. It reduces visual stress and helps readers understand dense content directly on the page, without breaking flow. Designed for students and everyday readers, it lowers the effort required to read, so more energy goes into understanding, not decoding.

trending.title: Construye con Strands Agents en Nerdearla Chile 2026
trending.description: Crea tu primer proyecto con Strands Agents en Nerdearla del 17 y 18 de Abril 2026 en Centro GAM, Santiago, Chile.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: Anukriti – What If Drug Trials Included Everyone?
trending.description: Simulating drug safety across diverse genomes to detect population-specific risks before clinical trials begin.

trending.title: Cómo crear un agente de IA desde cero. Open source, local y gratis.
trending.description: De un modelo que solo responde a uno que busca, razona y recuerda. Todo con código que puedes leer, forkear y contribuir.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: Ivy - The World's First Offline-Capable, Proactive AI Tutoring Agent
trending.description: A proactive AI tutoring agent powered by Amazon Bedrock that monitors student progress, initiates outbound voice calls, and runs on-device inference for offline learning addressing educational inequity for millions of Ethiopian students with intermittent connectivity.

trending.title: Introducing Article View Counts on AWS Builder Center
trending.description: You can now see how many builders are reading your articles, giving you a real metric to understand the reach of your content.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: Global Impact AI Navigator
trending.description: Global Impact AI Navigator (GIAN) is a multi-agent AI platform built on Amazon Bedrock that transforms a raw idea into a complete strategic package in under 60 seconds — SWOT diagnostic, live-grounded funding discovery, personalized roadmap, and a context-aware advisor. Designed for innovators in emerging markets, it democratizes access to the strategic guidance that usually requires expensive consultants or elite networks.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: VERA, A Multi-Agent Triage System for Healthcare in Chile
trending.description: A multi-agent healthcare triage system that screens patients in Chilean Spanish, detects crisis signals, and generates clinical reports. Built by two people on AWS for $17/month, designed to integrate with Chile's public health system via HL7 FHIR.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: VoiceAid – Bridging the Digital Divide for the Non-Literate and Elderly
trending.description: VoiceAid reimagines digital access through an orality-first approach, enabling non-literate and elderly users to interact with technology using natural speech instead of text. Powered by Amazon Bedrock and Nova Sonic, it delivers real-time, localized, and offline-capable assistance for critical needs like healthcare, farming, and scam prevention.

trending.title: Zero to Deployed ☁️: My AWS Journey
trending.description: Deploying a secure and cost-efficient web server using IAM, EC2, and Nginx on Ubuntu.

trending.title: Creating my first AWS Deployment
trending.description: I deployed a live web server as part of a hands-on cloud project, focusing on strong security and cost awareness. I used IAM to manage access, EC2 to host the server, and AWS billing tools to track and control spending.
